scripts.setup: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "server,client" --prefix "[{name}]" --prefix-colors "blue,magenta" "npm --prefix server run start:dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run lint && npm --prefix client run lint
